nodes.name: 亞馬遜州 (委內瑞拉)
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜州 (委內瑞拉)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括Pavonine quetzal、Two-banded puffbird、Orinoco piculet等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 博爾巴 (亞馬遜州)

nodes.name: Crimson-hooded manakin
nodes.summary: Crimson-hooded manakin（Crimson-hooded manakin，学名 Pipra aureola），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

links.evidence: borbae is found along the Madeira River in Amazonas state from Humaitá north to near the Amazon at Borba. The crimson-hooded manakin inhabits a variety of landscapes, most of which are wet

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is also found in coastal mangroves, and in Amapá on campina forest on white sand. In parts of Venezuela it also occurs in somewhat drier hilly areas but usually near swamps or otherwise wet areas
